products.name: RTCA DO-160 Environmental Testing
products.descriptor: Full-scope environmental qualification testing service for airborne equipment per RTCA DO-160 standard

evidence.snippet:
Aerospace RTCA DO-160 Testing
=============================
Streamline your aviation compliance journey with Element's comprehensive RTCA DO-160 testing services. Our end-to-end approach and century of expertise help you navigate complex requirements, accelerate time-to-market, and maintain lifetime compliance. Trusted by leading aerospace companies and OEMs, we deliver the certainty you need for airborne equipment certification.

products.name: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) and Inspection Services
products.descriptor: NDT inspection services evaluating materials and components without affecting integrity

evidence.snippet: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) and Inspection Services

Element's Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) covers a broad group of techniques used to evaluate the properties of materials, components, assemblies, parts, products, welds, and systems without affecting their integrity. Our services comply with a variety of industry standards, unique customer requirements, government contracts, and military specifications.

products.name: RoHS Compliance Testing
products.descriptor: Restricted hazardous substances compliance testing for electrical and electronic products

evidence.snippet: RoHS Compliance Testing Services

Restriction of Hazardous Substances (RoHS) compliance testing verifies that electrical and electronic products meet stringent restrictions on hazardous substances. Since the July 2021 expiration of the medical device exemption, additional testing is required for compliance, particularly for EAEU market access.

products.name: RTCA DO-227 Non-Rechargeable Battery Testing
products.descriptor: Aerospace non-rechargeable battery qualification testing per RTCA DO-227 for aviation applications

evidence.snippet:
RTCA DO-227 Non-Rechargeable Battery Testing
============================================
When mission-critical aircraft systems depend on battery performance, you need proven testing you can trust. Element's comprehensive RTCA DO-227 non-rechargeable battery testing services ensure your components meet rigorous aerospace standards. With high-capacity facilities and streamlined multi-test programs, we deliver the certainty you need for aerospace compliance.

products.name: Lithium Battery Testing and Certification
products.descriptor: Comprehensive safety, performance, and regulatory compliance testing for lithium-ion and lithium-metal batteries

evidence.snippet: Lithium Battery Testing and Certification Services

Need comprehensive lithium battery testing that ensures compliance while saving you time and money? Element's lithium battery testing and certification services provide a single source for all your testing needs - with the largest battery testing capacity in the US. Navigate complex regulations with confidence while bringing your battery products to market faster.

products.name: Defense Electronic Component Testing
products.descriptor: Secure testing of defense electronic components for OEMs and Tier suppliers using latest test equipment

products.name: Military EMC Testing Services
products.descriptor: Accredited MIL-STD-461 EMC compliance testing for ground, air, and sea defense equipment

products.name: Altitude Testing and Simulation
products.descriptor: High and low altitude simulation testing from -2,000 to 120,000 feet for aerospace and defense products

evidence.snippet:
Altitude Testing Services
=========================
Validate your products' performance under extreme altitude conditions from -2,000 to 120,000 feet. As your single-source environmental testing provider, we combine altitude, pressure, and temperature simulations to streamline validation and reduce costs. Our comprehensive testing delivers precise data for aerospace, transportation, and high-altitude equipment, accelerating time-to-market while ensuring mission-critical reliability.

products.name: MIL-STD-202 Testing
products.descriptor: ITAR/EAR certified MIL-STD-202 electronic component environmental and mechanical strength testing

products.name: Military Sand & Dust Testing Services
products.descriptor: Accredited sand and dust ingress testing for military products per MIL-STD-810, IP, and RTCA DO-160

products.name: Aerospace Composite Testing
products.descriptor: Mechanical, chemical, thermal, and environmental testing of polymer matrix and fiber-reinforced aerospace composites

evidence.snippet: Aerospace Composite Testing

Aerospace composite testing evaluates the performance, durability, and safety of advanced materials used in aircraft and spacecraft components. Through mechanical, chemical, thermal, and [environmental testing](https://www.element.com/environmental-testing), it ensures composites meet strict industry standards and performance requirements.

products.name: ESQ® (Early Stage Qualification)

evidence.snippet: Unique ESQ® Qualification Service
Fast-track your project with our Early Stage Qualification (ESQ®) service and Urgent Operational Requirement (UOR) testing.
